solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def defangIPaddr(self, address: str) -> str:
        return address.replace('.', '[.]')
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses the built-in replace method of Python strings, which has a high efficiency and a linear time complexity.
